description_long: This lantern features a robust cylindrical metal body with intricate textured patterns and mechanical details, suggesting a vintage or industrial design. The front is dominated by a large, circular glass lens, likely serving as the main light-emitting surface, surrounded by a protective metal rim. Several articulated metal arms and brackets are attached to the body, possibly for mounting or adjusting the lantern's position. The top section is capped with a small, knob-like finial, while the base is rounded and reinforced, adding to its sturdy appearance. The dark, weathered finish and visible rivets enhance its antique aesthetic, reminiscent of early 20th-century street or carriage lamps. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A vintage-style metal lantern with a large circular glass lens, intricate textured body, and articulated mounting arms. Its dark, weathered finish and robust construction evoke an industrial or early 20th-century aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, textured patterns, and articulated mounting arms, with the glass lens partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the large circular glass lens and protective metal rim, with minimal detail of the body visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the cylindrical body, mounting arms, and the full profile of the glass lens.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cylindrical body and mounting hardware, with the lens mostly obscured.
